name: Stardew Valley
tagline: Farming, friendship, and quiet seasons in Pelican Town
description: Grow crops, explore the mines, befriend villagers, and restore the community center at your own pace — a cozy farming life sim loved worldwide.

seo.title: Stardew Valley guides & cozy tips
seo.description: Grow crops, explore the mines, befriend villagers, and restore the community center at your own pace — a cozy farming life sim loved worldwide.

cozyMechanics: Seasonal farming at your own pace
Friendship and gifts without combat pressure
Community Center bundles as a long-term cozy goal
beginnerTips: Water crops daily until sprinklers unlock
Talk to villagers you pass on the way to the farm
about: Grow crops, explore the mines, befriend villagers, and restore the community center at your own pace — a cozy farming life sim loved worldwide.
